nodes.name: Card.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable Card component with title, description, actions, loading overlay, and configurable padding. Uses Tailwind classes for styling and react-i18next for loading text.

nodes.name: Card
nodes.summary: Section-based card component with optional header (title/description/actions), configurable padding, and a loading overlay with spinner animation.

nodes.name: Checkbox.tsx
nodes.summary: Checkbox component with indeterminate state support, forwarded ref, and aria-checked accessibility. Wraps native input with Tailwind styling.

nodes.name: Checkbox
nodes.summary: Forwarded-ref checkbox component supporting checked, indeterminate, and disabled states with aria-compliant accessibility.

nodes.name: DateTimePicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Full date-time picker with calendar grid, month navigation, hour/minute inputs, today/clear buttons. Renders via portal with flip-aware positioning. Depends on TextInput and selectStyles.

nodes.name: DateTimePicker
nodes.summary: Complex date-time selection component with calendar grid, month navigation, inline hour/minute inputs, and portal-based popover with auto-flip positioning.

nodes.name: Input.tsx
nodes.summary: TextInput component with solid/ghost variants, configurable size, and start/end adornments. Uses controlStyles for sizing and surface styling.

nodes.name: TextInput
nodes.summary: Forwarded-ref text input with variant (solid/ghost), size, and adornment support. Uses controlStyles for consistent sizing.

nodes.name: MultiSelect.tsx
nodes.summary: Multi-select component with searchable options, Select All toggle, tag chips with remove buttons, and portal-based dropdown with flip positioning.

nodes.name: MultiSelect
nodes.summary: Multi-select dropdown with search, checkbox options, Select All, tag display with removal, and portal-rendered animated dropdown.

nodes.name: ScrollArea.tsx
nodes.summary: Custom scroll area with drag-to-scroll thumb, ResizeObserver-based measurement, and hover/always visibility modes. Uses pointer capture for smooth dragging.

nodes.name: ScrollArea
nodes.summary: Custom scrollable container with custom scrollbar thumb that supports drag scrolling via pointer events and visibility toggling.

nodes.name: SearchableCheckboxMultiSelect.tsx
nodes.summary: Searchable multi-select with checkboxes, select/deselect filtered toggle, clear button, mobile-aware viewport positioning, and selection summary badges.

nodes.name: SearchableCheckboxMultiSelect
nodes.summary: Feature-rich searchable multi-select component with per-option checkboxes, filtered select/deselect, clear action, and responsive mobile breakpoint positioning.

nodes.name: SearchableSelect.tsx
nodes.summary: Searchable single-select with allow-create mode, configurable create label, hidden form input, and portal-based animated dropdown.

nodes.name: SearchableSelect
nodes.summary: Searchable single-select component supporting option creation, custom create labels, and portal-rendered animated dropdown.

nodes.name: Select.tsx
nodes.summary: Basic select component with default and chip variants, hidden form input, disabled state, and portal-rendered animated dropdown with flip positioning.

nodes.name: Select
nodes.summary: Single-select dropdown component with default and chip visual variants, portal-based dropdown with auto-flip positioning.

nodes.name: Tabs.tsx
nodes.summary: Tabs component with animated sliding indicator, context-based API (Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent), and configurable size.

nodes.name: Tabs
nodes.summary: Tabs root context provider that manages the current value and notifies children.

nodes.name: TabsList
nodes.summary: Tab list container with animated sliding highlight indicator that tracks the active tab via ResizeObserver.

nodes.name: TabsTrigger
nodes.summary: Clickable tab trigger button with active/inactive styling and aria-selected accessibility.

nodes.name: TabsContent
nodes.summary: Conditionally renders content when the tab value matches the active value.

nodes.name: ToggleSwitch.tsx
nodes.summary: Toggle switch component with optional label/description, disabled state, and role=switch accessibility.

nodes.name: ToggleSwitch
nodes.summary: A switch/toggle component with label, description, and disabled state using role=switch pattern.

nodes.name: constants.ts
nodes.summary: Theme and language constants including storage keys, language order, supported languages, and language label keys.

nodes.name: LanguageSelector.tsx
nodes.summary: Language selector dropdown with portal rendering, smart positioning, and integration with @code-proxy/i18n for resource loading.

nodes.name: LanguageSelector
nodes.summary: Dropdown language selector that loads i18n resources and persists the selection via localStorage.

nodes.name: ThemeProvider.tsx
nodes.summary: Theme provider with light/dark mode, localStorage persistence, system preference detection, View Transition API support, and ThemeToggleButton.

nodes.name: ThemeProvider
nodes.summary: Context provider for theme management with system preference detection, persistence, and View Transition API integration.

nodes.name: ThemeToggleButton
nodes.summary: Button that toggles between light and dark themes, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.

nodes.name: clipboard.ts
nodes.summary: Clipboard utility function that copies text using navigator.clipboard with a textarea fallback.

nodes.name: controlStyles.ts
nodes.summary: Control size constants (sm/default/lg) for height, text size, padding, and the controlSurface CSS class used across form components.

nodes.name: selectStyles.ts
nodes.summary: Shared CSS class builders and motion configurations for select/dropdown components. Includes trigger, panel, option, and animation utilities.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Empty placeholder file to keep the pages directory in version control.

nodes.name: ApiKeyLookupPage.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Test suite for ApiKeyLookupPage verifying restoration of last looked-up API key from sessionStorage and auto-query on page refresh.

nodes.name: api.ts
nodes.summary: API functions for public usage log lookup: fetchPublicLogs, fetchPublicChartData, and fetchAvailableModels (via /v1/models endpoint).

nodes.name: fetchPublicLogs
nodes.summary: Fetches paginated public usage logs via POST to the management API, with filters for days, model, and status.

nodes.name: fetchPublicChartData
nodes.summary: Fetches public chart data (daily series, model distribution) via POST to the management API.

nodes.name: fetchAvailableModels
nodes.summary: Fetches available model IDs from the /v1/models endpoint using Bearer token auth.

nodes.name: ApiKeyLookupPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Public API key lookup page with tabs (usage stats, request logs, available models, quick import). Includes key input, chart display, paginated logs, and content modal.

nodes.name: ApiKeyLookupPage
nodes.summary: Main public page for looking up API key usage, logs, models, and quick import with caching, sessionStorage persistence, and multi-tab layout.

nodes.name: LookupEmptyState.tsx
nodes.summary: Empty state placeholder shown when no API key has been queried yet, with a search icon and descriptive text.

nodes.name: LookupEmptyState
nodes.summary: Simple empty state component with search icon and i18n-driven title/description.

nodes.name: LookupResultsToolbar.tsx
nodes.summary: Toolbar with tabs (usage/logs/models/quickImport), time range selector for usage/logs tabs, and a refresh button.

nodes.name: LookupResultsToolbar
nodes.summary: Toolbar component providing tab navigation, time range selection, and refresh functionality for the API key lookup page.

nodes.name: ModelsTabContent.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Test file for ModelsTabContent component.

nodes.name: QuickImportTabContent.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Test file for QuickImportTabContent component.
